$comment: c27 (D-CSUBSET-VOLATILE-POINTEE): the pointer-to-volatile-POINTEE pin. main() derefs a `volatile int *p` across a re-assign and returns 42. `volatile` is now a TYPE qualifier (TypeKind::VolatileQual) so `*p` carries MirInstFlags::Volatile; Mem2Reg/CSE/DCE keep the volatile loads/store as real memory ops through the RELEASE pipeline. The end-to-end companion to the MIR-tier test PointerToVolatilePointeeDerefIsVolatile. Renamed in place from the retired pointee-reject example `volatile_error`. No stdout (libc-free); exit code only. arm64-elf runs under qemu.
